name: It Could Have Been Me
developer: Åsa Egnér vr-designer, Alexander Cobleigh programmer, Carolina Ask modeler, Emilia Carapic music, Joar Egnér Lofberg sounds, Johan Zdybal early modeller, Ali Ahmadi interview, Sakib Zabbar main voice, a lot more people
short_description: A journey from Afganistan to Sweden. Experience 26 documentary stories and 5 surreal worlds in VR. Rap from Emilia Carapic (Bac Nini)Voices from experiencers during the Night of Culture in Lund, where
